perf_hint: on software rendering, frame time scales with pixel count — preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p; `octaves = 2` then trims about a further 15%

params.name: flow_scale
params.description: How many cloud cells span the short edge of the frame.

params.name: turbulence
params.description: How hard the bass churns the flow field.

params.name: trail_decay
params.description: How much of the previous frame survives into this one.

params.name: burst_strength
params.description: How brightly an onset bursts from the centre.

params.name: flow_speed
params.description: How fast the clouds drift when nothing is playing.

params.name: octaves
params.description: Layers of noise: detail, at a cost on software rendering.

params.name: warp
params.description: How far the flow field drags the clouds into wisps.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the clouds.
